title: Notch Totem
body:
The Totem Now Looks Like NOTCH!This Resource pack make the old disgusting totem look much better by adding a notch skin!

Version/loader Compatibility:
This wors with 1.19-1.21.5(The latest verision)
Work s with Fabric, and Vanilla!
